current_setup_notes: Runs a sitewide overlay popup on 5s delay, no exit intent, template #4. Offers 10% off.
using a sidebar widget on blog posts only. asset: download free ebook. no triggers, just static.
Selling premium baking sheets and silicone molds. Exit intent coupon code popup active on checkout page.
Script installed via manual header injection. 0 impressions recorded this month despite 15k unique visitors. Generic newsletter signup slide-in.
Scroll trigger 50% on tech news articles. Lightbox popup offering weekly digest. Template modified heavily with custom CSS.
Standard welcome mat covering whole page instantly on load. Free 15 min consultation offer. High bounce rate reported on GA4.
Exit intent on cart page only. 15% discount code. Very high conversion but low overall volume.
Enterprise demo request form. Full screen takeover triggered immediately on homepage. Testing multi-step form fields.
inline form at the bottom of long-form articles. subscribing to travel tips newsletter.
Sitewide popup on 10s delay. Cookie duration set to 365 days. Asking for email and phone number on step 1.
2-step choice campaign on course catalog page. 'Are you a beginner or pro?' clicks trigger custom targeted lead forms.
Floating bar at the top of the page with a countdown timer for free shipping. No email input field, just a button linking to shop page.
Slide-in box on bottom right triggering after 30 seconds on site. Quote request form.
Timed popup (3s) on homepage only. Offering 'Top 5 Crypto Picks' PDF. No mobile optimization enabled.
Overlay popup on 5s delay, no exit intent, template #4. Written entirely in French, targeting EU users.
Welcome mat on landing page. Text says: 'Join our weekly HR newsletter.' Form asks for Company Name, Employee Count, Job Title, and Email.
Exit intent popup on all organic search landing pages. Free seed-planting calendar download.
Floating bar at bottom of mobile view. 'Call Now for Appointment' button. Also contains an email field.
MonsterLink trigger setup. Users must click the 'Unlock Secret Stash' text link to trigger the lightbox popup.
Sidebar contact widget on desktop. Form submission drops lead into a dead Webhook URL. Needs review.
Sitewide popup on 2s delay. Standard 'Join our mailing list for news.' No coupon or lead magnet offered.
Exit intent popup showing a funny meme targeting returning visitors only. Highly specific audience segment.
Slide-in box after 60% page scroll on the schedule page. Offers a free first class pass.
Inline whitepaper download form on technical documentation pages. Asks for business email. CAPTCHA enabled.
Spin-to-win gamified wheel popup triggered after 15 seconds on site. Offering various coupon prizes (5% to 25% off).
Full screen welcome mat on homepage. Form fields: Name, Phone, Email, Desired Budget, Timeline to buy.
Overlay popup on 5s delay, no exit intent, template #4. Duplicate setup of ID #1 but different domain.
Timed slide-in (7s) offering a free 14-day trial. Direct input field for email only.
Exit intent lightbox on product pages. Offering a free leather care guide PDF instead of a discount code.
Static inline box embedded inside the footer of the page. High friction form with 6 required input fields.
